com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Meshtastic Channel Index
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: Select the Meshtastic channel to use for ATAK traffic

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Filter by Channel Index
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Only receive messages from the specified channel

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Hop Limit
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: Maximum number of hops for outgoing messages

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Limit PLI Reporting Rate
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Reduce PLI frequency to conserve mesh bandwidth

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: PLI Reporting Interval
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: How often to send position updates (requires rate limit enabled)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Only Send PLI and Chat
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Use optimized protobuf format (recommended for Meshtastic)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Send Read/Delivery Receipts
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Send delivery and read receipts for chat messages

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Show Meshtastic Devices
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Display all Meshtastic nodes as markers on the map

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Hide Devices Without GPS
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Don't show nodes reporting 0,0 coordinates (requires Show Meshtastic Devices)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Hide Local Node
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Don't show your own Meshtastic device (requires Show Meshtastic Devices)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Relay to Server
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Forward messages from Meshtastic to connected TAK servers

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Relay from Server
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Forward PLI and chat from TAK servers to Meshtastic

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Enable File Transfer
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Allow sending files via Meshtastic (requires Short_Turbo preset, max 56KB)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Text to Speech
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Read incoming Meshtastic text messages aloud

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: PTT KeyCode
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: Hardware button code for voice memo recording

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: PTT Momentary Mode
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Hold button to transmit, release to stop (disable for latching mode)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Time Out Timer (TOT)
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: Maximum transmission length (prevents accidental long transmissions)

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Use Meshtastic GPS
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Use Meshtastic device GPS as ATAK's external GPS source

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Enable App-Layer Encryption
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Encrypt CoT payloads with AES-256-GCM before Meshtastic handoff. Keys stored on phone only — radio compromise does not expose message content.

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:title: Pre-Shared Key (PSK)
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanEditTextPrefe.android:summary: All team members must use the same key. Distribute via QR code or ATAK Data Package over a secure channel.

android.preference.Preference.android:title: Show Key QR Code
android.preference.Preference.android:summary: Display the encryption key as a QR code for team distribution

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:title: Enable Epoch Rotation
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanSwitchPrefere.android:summary: Automatically rotate encryption keys on a schedule. Provides forward secrecy — compromised keys cannot decrypt past traffic.

com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:title: Epoch Rotation Interval
com.atakmap.android.gui.PanListPreferenc.android:summary: How often to rotate encryption keys (all team devices rotate in sync)
